chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 78 of 2018 Present:- Mr. Justice Nadeem Akhtar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Date of hearing: & decision: 05.15.2019 Petitioner: Zahid Ali through Mr. Rashid Ali Khan, Advocate who is called absent. Respondents: Province of Sindh and others through Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. ORDER ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J:- Petitioner in the captioned petition is seeking appointment on ministerial post on son quota in Agriculture Department, Government of Sindh, in terms of Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servant (Appointment Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. Learned A.A.G. has pointed out that the case of the petitioner is based on son quota and there is no provision under the law to accommodate him on son quota basis. We agree with the contention of learned A.A.G. on the aforesaid proposition that under Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servant (Appointment Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974 there exists no provision to appoint a son / daughter of a retired employee of Government of Sindh. This being the legal position of the case, the instant petition is found to be meritless is accordingly dismissed with no order as costs. JUDGE JUDGE Karar_hussain/PS*
